titleStmt.title: SII 39.58: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 58. (A.R. No. 58 of 1916.) TIRUKKĀḶAKKUḌI, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. KAKŌḶANĀTH TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL, LEFT OF ENTRANCE. TRIBHUVAṈACHAKRAVARTIN KŌṈĒRIṈMAIKOṆḌĀṈ-7TH YEAR.

summary.p: This inscription states that the gift of tax free Nañjey, Puñjai lands located at Kumāttakkuḍi in Poṉṉamaravati-nāḍu for offerings, on the occasion of Pāvanaṅgāraṉ-sandi instituted by the officer Parākramapāṇḍya Māvilivānāḍi-rāyaṉ in the temple of Śivadharmīśvramuḍaiya-nāyaṉār at Tirukkōlakkuḍi in Puramalai-nāḍu. One of the signatories is mentioned as Venṟumuḍisūḍiṉaṉ-Enakkunalla-Perumāḷ alias Sundarapāṇḍya Pallavarāyaṉ of Sēvūr in Arumbūr-kūṟṟam. The king remitted taxes like Tariyiṟai, Sekkīṟai, Taṭṭoli-Taṭṭarapāṭṭam, Ērivari, iṉavari, Kulamāṇpāṭṭam, Poṉvari, Antarāryam Kārttigai Pachchai etc.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ koṉeriṉmai koṇṭāṉ puṟamalaināṭṭu tirukkoḷakkuṭi
Uṭaiyār śivadharmmiśvaram muṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil tāṉattāṟku taṅkaḷ nāyaṉāṟku makkaṇāya
ṉāṉa parākramapāṇṭiya māvili vāṇātarāyaṉ kaṭṭiṉa pāvaṉaṅka kāṟaṉ cantikku Amutupaṭi cāt
tuppaṭi Uḷḷuṭṭu veṇṭum nittanimantaṅkaḷukku Uṭalāka poṉṉamarāpati nāṭṭu nakara
ṅku mittakkuṭi nāṉ kellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nañce puṉceyum nattamum nattappāḷum
kuḷamum kuḷapparappum Āṟuṅkālum turavum maramum maṟṟum Uṭpaṭa nilattil paḻantevatā
ṉam tiruvuṭaiyāṭṭam paḷḷiccantam maṉittā yiṟaiyili nikki niṉṟa nilam kārum maṟuvum Oru pū
vum vampum karumpum ceṅkaḻunir vāḻaikon mañcaḷañci varaku cāmai pullu tiṉaipparuttikku Ā
maṇakku Eḷḷuk koḷḷu Uṭpaṭṭa payirum payiṟci cevittuk koḷḷavum colli yivai
yiṟṟāl varum kācu kaṭamai māvaṭai Āyavaṟkam taṟiyiṟai cekkiṟai taṭṭoli taṭṭārappā
ṭṭam Ērvari yiṉavari kuḷamīṉpāṭṭam poṉvari Antarāyam kāṇikkai kāttikaip paccai Ukavai
kaiyyeṟpu Āṇṭeḻuttu tevai Ōlaiyeḻuṟ viṉiyokam vācalppeṟu yilāñci
ṉaippeṟu Āṭtēvai taccuttēvai Āṉaiccālai kuturaippanti kuṟṟa teṇṭam ko
ṟṟilakkai kaṭaikkūṭṭu Ilakkai Uḷḷum pala Iṟaikaḷum tevaikaḷu Ēḻāvatu Āvaṇi
mātam mutal kaḻittu tevatāṉam mutalaṭaṅka yiṟaiyiliyākat tantu variyilār kaṇakki
lum kaḻikkac coṉṉom Ippaṭikku Ivarkaḷil nāṉ kellaikaḷilum tiruccūla sthāpaṉam pa
ṇṇik koṇṭu candrādityavaṟ cellak kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkoḷḷak kaṭavamāka
vūm Uṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu yāṇṭu 7 vatu nāraya Arumpūṟ kūṟṟattu cevūruṭaiyāṉ veṉṟu mu
ṭi cūṭiṉāṉ Eṉakku nalla perumāḷāṉa cuntarapāṇṭiya pallavarāyaṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 39.58 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
